targets.release_boundary: Voxel backend scene/grid preparation remains in Renderer_Voxel.cpp, but backbuffer transition, render-target binding, viewport/scissor, pipeline binding, descriptor binding, and fullscreen draw submission are owned by VoxelPass
targets.future_extension: Move future voxel fullscreen/backend draw submission into VoxelPass before expanding the experimental backend

targets.release_boundary: VoxelRenderState owns voxel grid upload-buffer allocation, persistent SRV allocation/update, and map/copy/unmap upload mechanics; Renderer_Voxel.cpp owns scene voxelization policy and delegates GPU upload through VoxelRenderState::UploadGridToGPU
targets.future_extension: Keep future voxel grid resource creation, descriptor writes, and CPU-to-GPU upload mechanics inside VoxelRenderState or a dedicated voxel resource pass

targets.release_boundary: The force-minimal-frame debug path keeps frame-plan selection in Renderer_FramePlanning.cpp, but backbuffer transition, render-target binding, clear, and used-as-RT tracking are owned by MinimalFramePass
targets.future_extension: Keep future minimal/debug clear-only output setup inside MinimalFramePass instead of adding direct swap-chain target setup back to frame planning

targets.release_boundary: RendererBreadcrumbState owns the readback breadcrumb buffer allocation, persistent map, initial marker value, and WriteBufferImmediate submission; Renderer_Diagnostics.cpp only validates renderer services, delegates creation/writes, and logs diagnostics
targets.future_extension: Keep future manual breadcrumb buffer mechanics in RendererBreadcrumbState or a dedicated diagnostic pass instead of adding loose resource/map/write-immediate code back to Renderer_Diagnostics.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Raw/history stats buffers, UAVs, readbacks, and descriptor tables are owned by RTReflectionSignalState. RTReflectionSignalStats owns signal-resource transitions, stats UAV barriers, and stats readback copies for both raw and history captures; Renderer_RTResources.cpp only delegates raw/history stats allocation, and Renderer_RTReflectionSignalStats.cpp only selects targets, dispatch descriptors, and frame-contract bookkeeping
targets.future_extension: If RT reflection capture/readback grows again, keep transition, UAV-barrier, and readback-copy mechanics behind the stats boundary instead of adding loose Renderer members

targets.release_boundary: End-frame policy still decides whether RT shadow, GI, and reflection histories should update, but the repeated source-to-history transition/copy/return-to-SRV mechanics are owned by RTHistoryCopyPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future RT temporal copy mechanics in RTHistoryCopyPass or an adjacent RT history pass helper instead of duplicating barrier/copy code in Renderer_FrameEnd.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_RTDenoise.cpp still owns denoise policy, normal-source selection, dispatch descriptors, and history-valid bookkeeping, but common input SRV transitions plus current/history signal transitions, history UAV barriers, and history return-to-SRV mechanics are owned by RTDenoiser
targets.future_extension: Keep future RT denoise resource-state mechanics in RTDenoiser or declarative render-graph declarations instead of rebuilding direct barriers in Renderer_RTDenoise.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_RTReflections.cpp still owns reflection readiness, source selection, dispatch sizing, environment-table refresh, and DXR dispatch policy, but depth/normal/output transitions, optional dispatch debug clear, environment non-pixel readability, and final UAV visibility barriers are owned by RTReflectionDispatchPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future RT reflection dispatch resource-state and debug-clear mechanics in RTReflectionDispatchPass or declarative render-graph declarations instead of adding direct barriers to Renderer_RTReflections.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_RTShadowsGI.cpp still owns TLAS build policy, shadow/GI dispatch gating, environment descriptor selection, and dispatch sizing, but DXR depth readability plus shadow-mask and GI-output UAV transitions are owned by RTShadowsGIPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future RT shadow/GI resource-state mechanics in RTShadowsGIPass or declarative render-graph declarations instead of adding direct barriers to Renderer_RTShadowsGI.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_FrameEnd.cpp still schedules end-frame cleanup, but the batched transition of SSAO, SSR, velocity, TAA intermediate, RT reflection color, and normal/roughness targets back to pixel-shader-resource state is owned by EndFrameShaderResourcePass
targets.future_extension: Keep future shared end-frame shader-resource cleanup in EndFrameShaderResourcePass instead of adding hand-built resource-barrier batches in Renderer_FrameEnd.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_FrameEnd.cpp still decides whether the swap-chain buffer was used and whether visual validation capture is active, but the backbuffer render-target-to-present transition plus optional readback/copy path are owned by BackBufferPresentPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future swap-chain present/capture transition mechanics in BackBufferPresentPass instead of adding direct backbuffer barriers or copy-readback setup in Renderer_FrameEnd.cpp

targets.release_boundary: manifest policy is owned by EnvironmentManifest and runtime environment reporting is owned by RendererEnvironmentState; public startup uses committed assets or procedural fallback
targets.future_extension: If environment streaming/residency becomes more complex, extract orchestration from Renderer_Environment without duplicating the manifest loader

targets.release_boundary: bloom controls, persistent pyramid resources, descriptor tables, fullscreen draw submission, temporal-screen resources, and cinematic post controls are held in named state/pass helpers and validated through ownership, graphics presets, and effects showcase frame-contract reporting. BloomPyramidResources::CreateTargets owns persistent bloom texture, RTV, and SRV creation; Renderer_Bloom.cpp only supplies dimensions, budgeted level count, and services. TemporalScreenPassState owns TAA history, TAA intermediate, and velocity target texture/view creation; Renderer_HDRTargets.cpp only invalidates history, supplies dimensions/services, and orchestrates dependent target creation
targets.future_extension: Keep new post effects inside these state files first; extract orchestration helpers only when a concrete new pass requires it

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_PostProcess.cpp still decides post-process draw policy and optional RT reflection debug clear, but regular post-process input SRV transitions and backbuffer render-target transition are owned by PostProcessTargetPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future regular post-process input/output target-state setup in PostProcessTargetPass instead of adding large resource-barrier batches in Renderer_PostProcess.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_Bloom.cpp still owns bloom stage ordering, barrier/copy mechanics, and SRV source selection, but fullscreen viewport/scissor setup, RTV binding, and target clears are owned by BloomPass::BindAndClearTarget
targets.future_extension: Keep future bloom fullscreen target binding and clears in BloomPass; extract bloom barriers and copy mechanics into explicit pass helpers before expanding bloom variants

targets.owner: Bloom stage transitions and composite copy
targets.release_boundary: Renderer_Bloom.cpp still owns bloom stage ordering and source/target selection, but per-stage resource transitions, final shader-resource transitions, composite target preparation, and the composite-to-combined copy are owned by BloomPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future bloom barrier and copy mechanics in BloomPass or declarative render-graph resource declarations instead of rebuilding manual barrier batches in Renderer_Bloom.cpp

targets.owner: Bloom fullscreen state and source binding
targets.release_boundary: Renderer_Bloom.cpp still owns bloom stage ordering and source/target selection, but fullscreen root/descriptor/frame binding, source SRV descriptor-table binding, pipeline switching, and fullscreen draw submission are owned by BloomPass and FullscreenPass helpers
targets.future_extension: Keep future bloom fullscreen root/descriptor/pipeline binding in BloomPass or FullscreenPass helpers instead of reintroducing direct command-list binding to Renderer_Bloom.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_PostProcess.cpp still decides whether the env/debug-gated RT reflection clear should run, but UAV transition, descriptor creation, clear, UAV barrier, and return-to-SRV mechanics are owned by RTReflectionDebugClearPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future RT reflection debug clear/readback mechanics in RTReflectionDebugClearPass or adjacent RT debug helpers instead of adding direct UAV/barrier code to Renderer_PostProcess.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_TAAExecution.cpp still owns temporal policy and shader resolve orchestration, but the repeated HDR-to-history and TAA-intermediate-to-HDR copy/barrier mechanics are owned by TAACopyPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future TAA history/intermediate copy mechanics in TAACopyPass instead of adding duplicated CopyResource/barrier batches in Renderer_TAAExecution.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_TAAExecution.cpp still owns temporal policy, descriptor-table refresh, and TAAPass::Resolve invocation, but TAA resolve input resource-state preparation and disabled-path HDR shader-resource transition are owned by TAACopyPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future TAA resolve input barrier mechanics in TAACopyPass or a dedicated TAA target pass before adding more temporal resources

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_TemporalMaskPass.cpp still owns source selection, visibility-buffer state snapshot handoff, frame-pass recording, and stats scheduling, but temporal-mask input/output transitions, UAV barriers, stats-buffer transition, and stats readback copy are owned by TemporalRejectionMask helpers
targets.future_extension: Keep future temporal-mask resource barriers and readback-copy mechanics in TemporalRejectionMask or declarative render-graph resource declarations

targets.release_boundary: TemporalMaskPassState owns temporal rejection mask texture, SRV/UAV, stats UAV buffer, stats UAV descriptor, and per-frame stats readback allocation; Renderer_TemporalResources.cpp only validates renderer services/dimensions, resets frame-contract diagnostics, delegates creation, and logs the target size
targets.future_extension: Keep future temporal-mask persistent resource or descriptor creation in TemporalMaskPassState or a narrower temporal-mask resource bundle instead of reintroducing direct descriptor/resource creation in Renderer_TemporalResources.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_MotionVectors.cpp still decides VB motion vs camera fallback and invokes MotionVectorPass, but velocity UAV/RT and depth sample-state target transitions are owned by MotionVectorTargetPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future motion-vector target-state setup in MotionVectorTargetPass instead of adding direct velocity/depth barrier batches in Renderer_MotionVectors.cpp

targets.release_boundary: SSAO and SSR controls, persistent render targets, descriptor tables, and per-frame flags are held in nested pass-owned state bundles and validated by ownership, screen-space UI/runtime smokes, and RT/temporal showcase paths. SSAOResources::CreateTarget owns persistent SSAO texture, RTV, SRV, and UAV creation; Renderer_SSAO.cpp only supplies dimensions and services. SSRResources::CreateTarget owns persistent SSR texture, RTV, and SRV creation; Renderer_HDRTargets.cpp only supplies dimensions, services, and dependent-target orchestration
targets.future_extension: Keep additional screen-space effects in explicit controls/resources/descriptors/frame bundles before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_SSRPass.cpp still selects the normal source and SSR policy, but SSR target, HDR, normal/roughness, and depth resource-state setup is owned by SSRPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future SSR pre-draw resource-state setup in SSRPass or render-graph declarations instead of hand-building barrier batches in Renderer_SSRPass.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_SSAO.cpp still owns SSAO resource creation, controls, and root-selection policy, but graphics/compute depth and SSAO target resource-state setup plus compute finalization are owned by SSAOPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future SSAO pre/post target-state setup in SSAOPass or render-graph declarations instead of hand-building barriers in Renderer_SSAO.cpp

targets.release_boundary: HZB persistent texture state, descriptor tables, debug controls, and capture metadata are split into nested pass-owned bundles. HZBPass owns HZB texture creation, per-mip SRV/UAV creation, full-mip debug SRV creation, and shader-visible dispatch table population, while Renderer_HZB.cpp only requests resources and records capture metadata
targets.future_extension: Keep future HZB texture/descriptor allocation and culling/debug expansion inside HZBPass plus the resources/descriptors/debug/capture bundles before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_HZB.cpp still owns HZB scheduling and capture metadata, but resource/descriptor creation is owned by HZBPass::CreateResources and depth/HZB resource transitions, compute root and pipeline binding, descriptor-table binding, mip dispatch, and per-mip shader-resource finalization are owned by HZBPass::BuildFromDepth
targets.future_extension: Keep future legacy HZB compute build mechanics in HZBPass or replace them with fully declarative render-graph resource declarations

targets.release_boundary: Shadow map persistent resources, raster viewport/scissor state, and shadow tuning controls are split into nested pass-owned bundles. ShadowMapResources::CreateMap owns the shadow map texture, per-slice DSVs, and SRV creation; Renderer_ShadowResources.cpp supplies the budgeted dimension, renderer services, raster viewport/scissor setup, and environment descriptor refresh. ShadowTargetPass owns shadow-map transitions, per-slice DSV binding, depth clear, viewport, and scissor setup while Renderer_ShadowPass keeps caster/material selection. Ownership plus runtime paths validate that shadows are rendered and consumed
targets.future_extension: Keep future shadow map and cascade resource expansion inside resources/raster/controls or the existing cascade/local shadow state before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Depth buffer resource state and DSV/SRV descriptors are split into pass-owned nested bundles. DepthPrepassTargetPass::CreateResources owns the depth texture, DSV/read-only DSV, and SRV creation; Renderer_DepthTarget.cpp only supplies size, render scale, services, and the device-removed callback. Ownership plus temporal/RT runtime paths validate depth write and sampling behavior
targets.future_extension: Keep future depth pyramid, read-only DSV, and depth sampling expansion inside resources/descriptors and DepthPrepassTargetPass resource helpers before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Depth prepass scene/material/depth-class iteration remains in Renderer_DepthPasses.cpp, but depth resource transition, DSV binding, depth clear, viewport, and scissor setup are owned by DepthPrepassTargetPass
targets.future_extension: Move future depth-prepass target setup or depth-only render-target binding into DepthPrepassTargetPass before expanding depth-prepass variants

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_FramePhases_Main.cpp still decides whether visibility-buffer fallback is needed, but the fallback depth-buffer transition back to depth-write state is owned by DepthWriteTransitionPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future depth write/read state repair mechanics in DepthWriteTransitionPass or adjacent depth pass helpers instead of hand-building barriers in frame orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Visibility-buffer culling/stage files still own debug mode, cull-mask policy, visibility draw, material resolve, and debug-blit selection, but depth visibility/sample transitions and HZB culling readability are owned by VisibilityBufferResourcePass
targets.future_extension: Keep future visibility-buffer resource-state mechanics in VisibilityBufferResourcePass or declarative render-graph declarations instead of hand-building barriers in renderer visibility-buffer files

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_IndirectRendering.cpp still owns indirect command generation, culling policy, and fallback decisions, but HZB culling readability is routed through VisibilityBufferResourcePass instead of hand-built renderer barriers
targets.future_extension: Keep future indirect-rendering resource-state mechanics in pass-owned helpers or declarative render-graph declarations instead of hand-building barriers in Renderer_IndirectRendering.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_IndirectRendering.cpp still owns indirect command generation, culling policy, and fallback decisions, but graphics state restoration, descriptor/root binding, and ExecuteIndirect submission are owned by IndirectMeshDrawPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future indirect root/descriptor binding and ExecuteIndirect mechanics in IndirectMeshDrawPass or a more specific GPU-driven pass helper instead of reintroducing direct command-list submission to Renderer_IndirectRendering.cpp

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_RootSignatureSetup.cpp and Renderer_IndirectRendering.cpp still decide when GPU culling is configured or when no-compaction indirect command preparation is needed, but those service handoffs route through IndirectMeshDrawPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future GPU-culling setup and indirect command-preparation handoffs in IndirectMeshDrawPass or a dedicated GPU-driven pass helper instead of spreading service calls through renderer orchestration files

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_FrameBegin.cpp and Renderer_GPUDriven.cpp still decide when frame startup and standalone GPU-culling dispatch need a shader-visible CBV/SRV/UAV heap, but the actual descriptor-heap command-list binding is owned by DescriptorTable
targets.future_extension: Keep future shared descriptor-heap binding in DescriptorTable or specific pass helpers instead of adding direct SetDescriptorHeaps calls to renderer orchestration files

targets.release_boundary: HDR and normal/roughness G-buffer render-target resources, descriptors, and resource states are split into nested pass-owned bundles. HDRRenderTargetState::CreateTarget and GBufferNormalRoughnessTargetState::CreateTarget own the main target texture, RTV, and SRV creation; Renderer_HDRTargets.cpp supplies render dimensions, scale, services, and dependent-target orchestration. MainPassTargetPass owns main-pass depth, RT shadow mask, RT GI, HDR, G-buffer, and fallback backbuffer transitions plus render-target binding, clears, viewport/scissor setup, root/pipeline binding, descriptor heap binding, and topology setup. Shared forward HDR/depth target transitions and binding are owned by ForwardTargetBindingPass for transparent, overlay, and water passes, and shared viewport/scissor setup routes through FullscreenPass. Ownership plus runtime paths validate that these targets are written, sampled, and presented
targets.future_extension: Keep future color/deferred targets inside explicit resources/descriptors bundles before adding renderer orchestration

targets.release_boundary: Forward, transparent, overlay, water, depth prepass, and shadow passes keep material, target, and pipeline setup local, but shared vertex/index binding and DrawIndexedInstanced submission are owned by MeshDrawPass
targets.future_extension: Move more pipeline/pass state into dedicated pass helpers before adding new forward-like draw paths

targets.release_boundary: Forward, transparent, overlay, water, depth-prepass, and shadow mesh passes keep visibility/material-policy decisions in renderer orchestration, but shared root-signature binding, descriptor-heap binding, pipeline binding/switching, frame/environment binding, primitive topology setup, object/material constant binding, and material descriptor-table binding are owned by MeshDrawPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future repeated mesh root/material descriptor and mesh pipeline binding in MeshDrawPass or a more specific mesh-pass helper instead of reintroducing direct root/table binding to renderer pass loops

targets.release_boundary: Forward and shadow mesh passes still allocate and decide the contents of biome, frame, and shadow constants, but root constant-buffer binding for those auxiliary mesh constants is owned by MeshDrawPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future mesh-pass root constant binding in MeshDrawPass or a more specific pass helper instead of reintroducing direct SetGraphicsRootConstantBufferView calls to renderer mesh pass files

targets.release_boundary: Renderer_MeshUpload.cpp still owns mesh validation, tangent generation, buffer allocation, staging-map writes, descriptor registration, queue/fence policy, and BLAS scheduling, but upload command allocator/list reset, vertex/index CopyBufferRegion commands, and command-list close are owned by MeshUploadCopyPass
targets.future_extension: Keep future upload command recording and copy submission mechanics in MeshUploadCopyPass or a dedicated upload service instead of adding CopyBufferRegion calls to Renderer_MeshUpload.cpp

targets.release_boundary: ECS CPU-simulated particles with DX12-instanced billboard rendering are the public Phase 3 path, with controls/resources/frame stats split into pass-owned bundles. ParticleRenderResources owns instance/quad buffer allocation, upload, and vertex-buffer view creation; ParticleBillboardPass owns render-target barriers, pipeline binding, and draw submission; renderer ownership tests reject moving that GPU resource/draw work back into Renderer_Particles.cpp. Backend-stage frame-contract stats and effects showcase validation keep GPUParticleSystem non-public until GPU simulation/sort/render are runtime-validated
targets.future_extension: Keep GPU particle migration explicit and separate from the public billboard contract until it has equivalent budget and visual validation

targets.release_boundary: DebugLineRenderState owns line collection plus upload-buffer allocation, upload, and vertex-buffer view creation; DebugLinePass owns pipeline/root binding, IA setup, and draw submission; renderer/editor frame contracts report debug-line draw counts through the existing DebugLines pass
targets.future_extension: Keep future debug primitive buffers and draw submission in debug state/pass helpers instead of adding loose Renderer resources
